agent_port.description: In-container gRPC port for clawkerd agent connections (mTLS, clawker-net only)
agent_port.title: Agent Port

hydra_admin_port.description: Hydra admin API for introspection and client registration (HTTPS, container-internal)
hydra_admin_port.title: Hydra Admin Port

oathkeeper_port.description: Oathkeeper HTTP auth proxy for future webui (HTTPS)
oathkeeper_port.title: Oathkeeper Port

socket.description: Host path to the Docker daemon socket
socket.title: Docker Socket

enable.description: Master switch for the Envoy firewall; when off, containers have unrestricted network access
enable.title: Enable Firewall

grace_period.description: How long to keep the proxy alive after the last container stops
grace_period.title: Grace Period

max_consecutive_errs.description: Restart the proxy daemon after this many consecutive failures
max_consecutive_errs.title: Max Consecutive Errors

poll_interval.description: How often to check if containers still need the proxy
poll_interval.title: Poll Interval

port.description: Local port the proxy daemon binds to
port.title: Daemon Port

port.description: Local port the host proxy listens on (change if 18374 conflicts)
port.title: Manager Port

compress.description: Gzip rotated logs to save disk space
compress.title: Compress Logs

file_enabled.description: Write structured logs to disk for debugging and diagnostics
file_enabled.title: Enable File Logging

max_age_days.description: Delete rotated logs older than this
max_age_days.title: Max Log Age (days)

max_backups.description: Number of rotated log files to keep
max_backups.title: Max Backups

max_size_mb.description: Rotate the log file when it exceeds this size
max_size_mb.title: Max Log Size (MB)

enabled.description: Send logs to the OTEL collector for OpenSearch visibility (requires monitoring stack running)
enabled.title: OTEL Logging

export_interval_seconds.description: How often to flush buffered logs to the collector
export_interval_seconds.title: OTEL Export Interval (sec)

max_queue_size.description: Buffer this many log records before dropping (increase if you see gaps)
max_queue_size.title: OTEL Queue Size

timeout_seconds.description: Give up on an export batch after this long
timeout_seconds.title: OTEL Timeout (sec)

opensearch_dashboards_port.description: Host port for the OpenSearch Dashboards UI
opensearch_dashboards_port.title: OpenSearch Dashboards Port

opensearch_heap_mb.description: JVM -Xms/-Xmx for the OpenSearch node; raise on memory-hungry workloads
opensearch_heap_mb.title: OpenSearch Heap (MB)

opensearch_port.description: Host port for the OpenSearch REST API (logs + traces backend)
opensearch_port.title: OpenSearch Port

otel_collector_host.description: Hostname for reaching the collector from the host
otel_collector_host.title: OTEL Collector Host

otel_collector_port.description: Host port for the OTEL HTTP receiver
otel_collector_port.title: OTEL Collector Port

otel_grpc_port.description: Host port for the OTEL gRPC receiver
otel_grpc_port.title: OTEL gRPC Port

otel_infra_port.description: Port the OTel collector listens on for infra service logs (CP, Envoy, CoreDNS)
otel_infra_port.title: OTEL Infra Port

prometheus_metrics_port.description: In-network port the otel-collector exposes its Prometheus scrape endpoint on (Prometheus scrapes the collector over clawker-net for collector + agent metrics; not host-published — no localhost binding, no host port-conflict check needed)
prometheus_metrics_port.title: Prometheus Metrics Port

prometheus_port.description: Host port for the Prometheus UI and its native OTLP receiver (agent metrics flow through the OTEL collector, not here; this port is only used by direct OTLP pushers)
prometheus_port.title: Prometheus Port

include_account_uuid.description: Tag telemetry with your Anthropic account ID (useful for multi-user setups)
include_account_uuid.title: Include Account UUID

include_session_id.description: Tag telemetry with session ID to correlate events across a single run
include_session_id.title: Include Session ID

log_tool_details.description: Capture full tool call inputs/outputs in telemetry (verbose but useful for debugging)
log_tool_details.title: Log Tool Details

log_user_prompts.description: Capture user prompts in telemetry (disable for privacy)
log_user_prompts.title: Log User Prompts

logs_export_interval_ms.description: How often the Claude Code harness exports logs (lower = more real-time, higher = less overhead)
logs_export_interval_ms.title: Logs Export Interval (ms)

metric_export_interval_ms.description: How often the Claude Code harness exports metrics (lower = more granular, higher = less overhead)
metric_export_interval_ms.title: Metric Export Interval (ms)

prometheus_otlp_path.description: HTTP path on Prometheus' native OTLP receiver — available for direct OTLP/HTTP pushers that want to bypass the collector
prometheus_otlp_path.title: Prometheus OTLP Path

active.description: Whether the unit is materialized and seeded into the monitoring stack; defaults to false
active.title: Active

path.description: Absolute path to the monitoring unit directory (monitoring.yaml plus artifact subdirs); empty on an entry that only toggles a built-in unit's activation — no ~ or $VAR expansion
path.title: Path

units.description: Host-global monitoring unit registry keyed by unit name; registered path and activation state
units.title: Monitoring Units
